summary.description: A long-form, detailed narrative summary (2-4 paragraphs). Open with a clear statement of the user's immediate focus and inferred goal — what they are trying to accomplish right now — based on visual cues in the screenshots: the frontmost (active) window, cursor or caret position, text being typed or edited, highlighted selections, open files and tabs, scroll position, and frontmost application context. Then describe the broader context, applications and tools being used, the state of their workspace, their apparent intent. Mention visible file names, project directories, code snippets, UI states, terminal output, and any other relevant details. Be specific and concrete.

events.description: Specific actions or events inferred from the screenshots.

event.description: A specific action or event inferred. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

confidence.description: Confidence score 1-10. 10 = absolutely certain from visual evidence.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing specific visual details from the screenshots that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived (a one-time event that happened right now), 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern (e.g., a stable personality trait, skill, or preference). Rate by considering urgency (immediate time pressure vs no deadline) and durability (will this matter 24 hours from now?).

personalities.description: Personality traits observed in the user.

personality.description: A personality trait observed. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this observation.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

skill.description: A technical skill demonstrated. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

interests.description: Topics or domains the user is actively engaged with.

interest.description: A topic or domain of active engagement. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

preferences.description: Tool, workflow, or UI choices the user appears to prefer.

preference.description: A tool, workflow, or UI preference observed. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

ownerships.description: Projects, tools, or assets the user appears to own or be responsible for. Empty array if unclear.

ownership.description: A project, tool, or asset owned. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

relationships.description: People, teams, services, or organizations the user relates to. Empty array if unclear.

relationship.description: A relationship the user has, specifically what relationship and who. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

weaknesses.description: Potential areas of inefficiency, risk, or struggle. Be constructive.

weakness.description: A potential inefficiency or risk observed. Be constructive. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.

goals.description: Abstract, higher-level objectives the user appears to be working toward.

goal.description: An abstract objective inferred. 1-2 descriptive sentences.

evidence.description: 1-2 sentences citing visual details that support this.

lifespan.description: How long this observation is likely to stay relevant. 1 = short-lived, 10 = long-lasting insight or pattern. Rate by considering urgency and durability.
